violations.description: Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Two Deli Express items (Ham and Cheese sandwiches and Char broil burgers) were not date stamped in to-go refrigerator.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Green residue at edges of soda machine ice chutes with limescale/debris along the bottom edges of the chutes. -Some residue along the bottom edge of the interior panel of the bulk ice machine.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. -Case of single use cups stored on floor near soda bibs.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Dust/debris behind soda bib storage in back room.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. -Gap at caulking around mop sink basin.

Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 140F or above during display or service. -Middle roler grill tornado items found at 125-128F. *Put on at ~8:30 am. Directed to dispose of by 12:30pm.
Temperature measuring devices. — --Temperature measuring device was not accurate or not easily readable. -Thermometers in the cold brew and creamer dispensers were damaged and/or not accurate.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Limescale/residue at soda machine ice chutes. -Minimal debris along bottom edge of ice machine interior panel.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Residue at handle and door of upright freezer near dish pit. -Dried debris at underside edge of creamer dispenser. -Dried food debris at back surfaces of chili and cheese dispensers. -Dust/debris at walk in cooler fans.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc. …) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Dust/debris at wall and floor corner behind soda bibs and below desk.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
